$comment: c39 D-FFI-STDINT-CONSTANT-MACROS: the C99 7.18.4 *_C integer-constant macros shipped from <stdint.h> (sqlite uses UINT64_C 48x for 64-bit bitmask constants). UINT64_C(0x100000000)=2^32; >>32 = 1 ONLY if the constant is full 64-bit. RED-ON-DISABLE: pre-c39 UINT64_C was undeclared (S0001) → would not compile; a 32-bit truncation makes the top term 0 → exit 13 not 42. INT64_C/UINT32_C cover the signed/u32 family. 1*29+5+7+1 = 42. Release pipeline + all 4 targets.
